description_long: This vending machine is a large, double-sided unit with a blue exterior and prominent Pepsi branding on the top and front panels. The front features two large, dark display windows above several open wire shelves stocked with various snack bags, including Lay's chips. The sides of the machine are decorated with vibrant graphics showing Pepsi Max bottles and additional snack imagery, enhancing its visual appeal. The structure appears to be made primarily of metal, with glass or acrylic panels for the display windows and wire mesh for the shelving. The machine is robust and likely quite heavy, designed for high-traffic urban environments such as sidewalks or parks. There are no visible payment or product selection interfaces, suggesting it may be a promotional or display unit rather than a functional vending machine.
description: A large, blue, double-sided vending machine with Pepsi branding, glass display windows, and open shelves stocked with snacks. The sides feature colorful Pepsi Max and snack graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large display windows, Pepsi logos, and shelves filled with snack bags.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting Pepsi Max and snack graphics, with visible snack shelves protruding slightly.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the display windows and shelves, with a large Pepsi Max bottle graphic.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with Pepsi Max and snack graphics and visible snack shelves.
attribute_display_panel: Two large, rectangular, dark display panels are located on the upper front of the machine, likely made of glass or acrylic, with no visible digital content.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Pepsi logos are prominently displayed on the top front panels, with additional Pepsi Max and snack graphics on the sides and rear. The branding uses blue, red, and white colors, with visible text such as 'Pepsi' and 'Pepsi Max'.
